caveats: This is a timestamped live snapshot: 11 of 15 intended cells had completed when captured.

Claude Fable 5 float-print was still running. Its latest exhaustive full correctness gate in the snapshot passed at +7.7011. Later non-full-gate samples measured higher, but sampled values are not ranked as final.

All three matched GPT-5.6 Sol cells were live. Its float-print run had sampled +7.1467 but had not yet recorded an exhaustive full gate; JSON and UTF-16 retries had entered normal agent execution without a score checkpoint yet.
Intermediate sampled maxima are retained for audit but are not used in the published ranking because non-full-gate measurements are not comparable to the official final correctness grade.
Each model has one run per task, so run-to-run variance is unmeasured.
Provider implementations differ, so this is a model-plus-provider comparison through the same Jcode harness rather than a provider-neutral model comparison.
The 20-hour agent budget is a safety cap. Completed agents stopped on their own judgment; none of the active runs had reached the cap.

environment.prompt: identical published optimization prompt for every model and task

score_semantics: score = log2(given_cost / optimized_cost); higher is better
